response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates excellent software engineering practices (TDD, clean architecture, complex system experience), they lack the core required expertise. There is minimal evidence of Java or Kotlin depth, no Spring or enterprise framework experience, and critically no IDE internals or language tooling experience—all explicitly required for the role. The recent career trajectory focuses on web/TypeScript and AI infrastructure, not JVM ecosystem work.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship culture with proven TDD, CI/CD, and clean architecture practices
Extensive experience handling complex systems at scale (microservices, data integration, millions of requests/second)
Proven track record as independent contributor at Senior/Staff level across multiple companies
concerns: Minimal evidence of Java/Kotlin expertise despite listing them; recent work predominantly TypeScript/web-focused
No demonstrated experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or other enterprise frameworks required for the role
No background in IDE internals, language tooling, build tools, or compiler-adjacent work—critical gaps for this position
